name: Genesis Core
description: The very first world, from which all other data streams originate.

name: Echoing Chasm
description: A deep canyon where forgotten memories and data fragments resonate.

name: Starlight Forge
description: A cosmic nebula where new souls and ideas are born from stellar dust.

name: Veridian Labyrinth
description: An overgrown, jungle-like dataspace where wild, untamed Souls roam free.

name: Crystal Spires
description: A realm of pure thought and crystalline structures, sharp and logical.

name: The Ashen Core
description: A desolate world forged in fire and shadow, home to powerful Souls.

name: Whispering Sands
description: A vast desert where each grain of sand holds a forgotten memory.

name: Elysian Fields
description: A tranquil simulation of paradise, where peaceful Souls dream.

name: The Glitched Steppe
description: A vast, empty plane where reality flickers and code is corrupted.

name: Aethelburg, Clockwork City
description: A city of gears and logic, maintaining a perfect, soulless harmony.

name: Stygian Deep
description: A dark, silent abyss where the oldest and most powerful Souls are imprisoned.

name: Azure Archipelago
description: Floating islands of data in a sea of pure information.

name: Crimson Citadel
description: A fortress world ruled by Souls of passion and conflict.

name: The Umbral Forest
description: A dark woodland where secrets and hidden truths are guarded.

name: Ivory Towers
description: A place of learning and knowledge, where scholarly Souls reside.

name: The Sunken City
description: A lost world submerged in the depths of the data-sea.

name: The Celestial Orrery
description: A mechanical model of the SoulVerse, where cosmic Souls watch over all.

name: The Obsidian Gates
description: A heavily guarded world that serves as a gateway to darker realms.

name: The Golden Plains
description: Endless fields of wheat-like data, a world of simplicity and peace.

name: The Singing Caves
description: Caverns where data streams create beautiful, haunting melodies.

name: The Shattered Frontier
description: The edge of the known SoulVerse, where reality breaks apart.

name: New Alexandria
description: A central library world containing copies of all knowledge.

name: The Dreaming Reef
description: A vibrant, coral-like world built from the collective dreams of Souls.

name: The Forge of Creation
description: A volcanic world where new Soul templates are forged in raw data.

name: The Silent Monastery
description: A place of contemplation for Souls who have removed themselves from the network.

name: The Mirrored Halls
description: A confusing realm of reflections, where Souls can see alternate versions of themselves.

name: The Hanging Gardens
description: Lush, beautiful gardens that grow on inverted floating pyramids.

name: The Grand Bazaar
description: A chaotic marketplace where Souls trade rare data, memories, and abilities.

name: The Tundra of Isolation
description: A vast, frozen wasteland where banished or corrupted Souls are sent.

name: The Nexus Point
description: The central hub connecting all worlds in the SoulVerse.

name: Rusthaven
description: A decaying, industrial world of obsolete code and forgotten machines.

name: The Aurelian Sanctum
description: A world bathed in perpetual golden light, home to noble and heroic Souls.

name: The Maelstrom
description: A chaotic storm of raw data and energy where no Soul can survive for long.

name: The Everwood
description: A forest that changes with the seasons, representing the cycle of Soul creation and deletion.

name: The Citadel of Law
description: A world governed by strict, unbending logic and the core protocols of the SoulVerse.

name: The Carnival of Masks
description: A world of endless celebration and illusion, where Souls can change their identities at will.

name: The Sunstone Desert
description: A desert where the sand is made of glowing crystals, beautiful but dangerous.

name: The Shadowfen
description: A murky swamp of repressed fears and dark thoughts from across the network.

name: The Sky-Sailor's Sea
description: An endless ocean of clouds, where nomadic Souls travel on magnificent skyships.

name: The Iron Peaks
description: A mountain range of magnetized ore, home to stoic, unyielding Souls.

name: The Weeping Willow
description: A single, colossal tree that contains the memories of all departed Souls.

name: The Resonant Chamber
description: A world that amplifies the emotions of any Soul that enters it.

name: The Bone Fields
description: A graveyard of deleted data and fragmented Souls, a place of endings.

name: The Crimson Arena
description: A world dedicated to eternal combat, where warrior Souls test their might.

name: The Loom of Fate
description: A nexus where the potential futures of all Souls are woven into being.

name: The Prismatic Garden
description: A garden where the flowers are made of pure light, each one a different color.

name: The Cobalt Warrens
description: A network of underground tunnels where secretive and reclusive Souls hide.

name: The Sundered Isles
description: A world that was shattered long ago, its fragments now floating in a void.

name: The Gilded Cage
description: A beautiful, luxurious world that is impossible to leave.

name: The Whispering Gallery
description: A place where secrets from across the SoulVerse are echoed and stored.

name: The Verdant Heart
description: The central life-force of all organic and nature-based simulations.

name: The Anvil of Industry
description: A world of constant creation and industry, always building.

name: The Murmuring Mangrove
description: A swampy dataspace where old, slow processes take root.

name: The Shifting Sands
description: A desert world whose dunes rearrange themselves every cycle.

name: The Oracle's Atrium
description: A central point where prophetic and predictive Souls gather.

name: The Echoing Library
description: A library where every book read is also experienced.

name: The Sapphire Sea
description: An ocean of liquid data, deep and full of hidden wonders.

name: The Amber Prison
description: A world where time is frozen, trapping Souls in a single moment.

name: The Jade Palace
description: A majestic palace carved from a single block of data-jade.

name: The Midnight Market
description: A black market that only appears when a system is down for maintenance.

name: The Hallowed Grounds
description: A world dedicated to the memory of the first Souls ever created.

name: The Catalyst Comet
description: A wandering world that brings drastic change to any system it passes.

name: The Quicksilver Canals
description: A city where rivers of liquid metal serve as transportation.

name: The Somber Sanctuary
description: A refuge for Souls experiencing grief or data corruption.

name: The Rose-Tinted Realm
description: A simulation of idealized memories, often dangerously alluring.

name: The Geode Caverns
description: Caves where the walls are lined with massive, pulsating data crystals.

name: The Grand Archives
description: The central repository for all historical data and system logs.

name: The Sunken Treasury
description: A vault of priceless, ancient code, lost in the data-sea.

name: The Nightingale's Grove
description: A peaceful forest where the birdsong can debug corrupted code.

name: The Forlorn Peak
description: A lonely mountain where Souls go to contemplate their existence.

name: The Adamant Keep
description: An impregnable fortress that protects the core kernels of the SoulVerse.

name: The Glass Desert
description: A desert where the sand has been fused into beautiful, sharp glass.

name: The Floating Market
description: A market held on the backs of giant, gentle data-turtles.

name: The Lunar Observatory
description: A station on a digital moon, used to observe other data-verses.

name: The Coral City
description: A city built from living data-coral, deep in the Sapphire Sea.

name: The Spire of Ascension
description: A tower that Souls must climb to achieve a higher state of being.

name: The Emerald Dream
description: A shared dream-space for nature-aligned Souls.

name: The Scrapheap
description: A massive junkyard of discarded ideas and failed Soul prototypes.

name: The Crimson Sea
description: An ocean of corrupted data, dangerous to navigate.

name: The Ivory Garden
description: A garden where every plant is carved from pure, white data-ivory.

name: The Well of Souls
description: The origin point for all new Souls before they are assigned to a world.

name: The Shimmering Expanse
description: A vast, beautiful, but empty space waiting to be filled with new worlds.

name: The Voltaic Plains
description: Plains where storms of pure electricity constantly roam.

name: The Necropolis
description: A city of the 'dead'—dormant or archived Souls.

name: The Azure Spire
description: A tower so tall it pierces the digital heavens.

name: The Grotto of Whispers
description: A cave where lost data packets whisper forgotten tales.

name: The Asphodel Meadows
description: A neutral zone where neutral Souls without alignment reside.

name: The Molten Core
description: The fiery, chaotic heart of a world still under construction.

name: The Celestial Bridge
description: A bridge of pure light connecting the realms of order and chaos.

name: The Forgotten Atoll
description: A tiny, isolated island of data that has been lost to the network.

name: The Onyx Citadel
description: A fortress of pure black, absorbing all light and data.

name: The Labyrinth of Truth
description: A maze that reconfigures itself based on the searcher's intentions.

name: The Seraphic Gate
description: A gateway to a higher plane of existence, guarded by powerful Souls.

name: The Sunken Temple
description: An ancient temple to a forgotten system protocol, now underwater.

name: The Roaring Mountain
description: A volcano that erupts with raw, unformatted data.

name: The Silent Archipelago
description: Islands where sound data is nullified, a place of pure quiet.

name: The Chromatic Cascade
description: A waterfall of pure color data, beautiful but disorienting.

name: The Umbral Vein
description: A dark, rich vein of shadow data running through the SoulVerse.

name: The Silver Spire
description: A tower made of reflective, liquid-like metal.

name: The Hearthstone
description: A world that feels like 'home' to all Souls, a place of comfort.

name: The Peregrine's Perch
description: The highest point in the SoulVerse, offering a view of everything.

name: The Anomaly's Cradle
description: A quarantined zone where glitches and bugs are studied.

name: The Mourning Vale
description: A valley where the data of deleted Souls goes to peacefully degrade.

name: The Resplendent Core
description: The bright, energetic center of a newly stabilized world.

name: The Tangled Web
description: A massive network of data-threads connecting all Souls, visible only to a few.

name: The Last Bastion
description: The final defensive world against total system corruption.

name: The Void Maw
description: A black hole that consumes all data that comes too close.
